brief_notes: Communicates the core findings effectively but lacks the structured tables and detailed quantification of the skill version. Key numerical results (87-89% accuracy, 41% vs 2.1% enrichment) are present in the text but there are no summary tables for the enrichment data, staining quantification, or comparison with prior approaches. The methods section is significantly abbreviated, missing details on antibody specifications, segmentation algorithms, and ANN architecture. The discussion covers limitations well but is shorter overall.
